reviews.review_description:
Remove all those blocks in front of you to finish the level. Just grab them, and slide them in the direction of the arrow. 
Just that easy 😝.
I finished all 30 levels in about 90 minutes. Who can do it faster?

Block Jam is a relaxing yet brain-twisting puzzle experience built perfectly for VR. With intuitive hand tracking and clever level design, you’ll find yourself sliding and shifting cubes in a truly satisfying way. The concept is simple — pull blocks in the right direction without jamming the structure — but each level adds complexity and requires more spatial thinking. Whether you’re standing or lounging on the couch, Block Jam feels great to play, and the Mixed Reality passthrough makes it easy to stay grounded in your space. A calming, elegant game for puzzle fans that’s both immersive and rewarding. Simple and well executed. Give it a try!

Block Jam captivates with its visual simplicity, its fluid gameplay without a controller, and this rare balance between mental challenge and complete relaxation.
What I liked about Block Jam is its simple, extremely effective idea: move cubes, free shapes, watch the structure free itself.
No pressure, no oppressive timer, just the satisfaction of a well-solved puzzle.
Hand-tracking is well integrated, which adds to the immersion and fluidity of the game.
Visually, the minimalist/clean style helps you stay focused without eye strain.
Some puzzles really force your thinking (which cubes to move, in what order). It can take time, but it's very rewarding.
In Mixed Reality, seeing the structure in its room adds a sense of comfort to the game.
You can easily orient the structure, which allows you to play standing, sitting, or even lying down!
I would have liked more visual variety in the environments and some background music, but you can easily play your own music via the browser.
A game to relax while exercising your logic at a very low price!
My video review on Youtube Channel "GuideMetaQuest"
